details.text: Sir/Mam' are you in agreement with the declaration that I have r ead out to you.

examples.corrected: Sir/Ma'am are you in agreement with the declaration that I have read out to you.
Cancer or carcinoma-in-situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukaemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, tumors, polyps, nodules, cysts, lump or other growths

Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, Pancreatitis/Pancreatic disorder or any gastrointestinal diseases or disorders
